name: Patriot
description_short: Patriot Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving communities since 1965, offering competitive savings, loans, and checking accounts with NCUA federal insurance.
description_long: Patriot Federal Credit Union was established in 1965 and operates as a federally insured credit union under the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA). The organization is member-owned and not-for-profit, distinguishing it from traditional commercial banks. Patriot offers a comprehensive range of personal and business financial products. Personal services include checking and savings accounts, personal loans, credit cards with rewards programs (1.5% cash back VISA card), and certificates of deposit. Business services extend to business checking, savings, loans, and credit card options. The credit union also provides debit card rewards programs, online and mobile banking access, and competitive dividend rates on savings products (ranging from 2.50% APY on dividend checking to 3.60% APY on 8-month certificates as of the website snapshot). Patriot distinguishes itself through community-focused initiatives and accessibility features. The credit union has donated over $300,000 to community organizations, distributed $23+ million in dividends to members, and impacted 185+ organizations. They offer interpretation services in over 240 languages through LanguageLine Solutions, demonstrating commitment to serving diverse membership. The credit union emphasizes local expertise and personalized service, positioning itself as a community-rooted alternative to larger financial institutions. Educational content through their blog addresses member financial wellness topics. Patriot Federal Credit Union is a legitimate credit union with federal oversight and member protections. As with all credit unions, membership requirements likely apply, and rates/terms vary by creditworthiness and product type. The organization appears well-established and community-oriented, making it suitable for consumers seeking local banking relationships with credit union membership benefits.
services: Debit card with point rewards redeemable for gift cards
Cash back rewards VISA credit card
pros: NCUA federal insurance protects member deposits and accounts
Donated $300,000+ to community organizations with 185+ organizations impacted
Distributed $23+ million in dividends to members
Interpretation services available in 240+ languages for accessibility
1.5% cash back on VISA credit card plus additional debit card rewards
24/7 access through online banking and mobile app
Competitive dividend rates on savings accounts and certificates
cons: Limited information provided about personal loan rates, terms, and APR ranges
Membership eligibility requirements not clearly detailed on homepage
Fee structure for accounts and services not transparently listed on provided pages
Geographic service area limitations implied but not explicitly stated
No information about credit score minimums or lending standards
best_for: Community-minded consumers seeking local credit union membership with dividend returns
Members requiring multilingual banking support and accessibility services
Customers interested in rewards programs and competitive savings rates
Small business owners seeking local business lending and banking relationships
diagnosis: Patriot Federal Credit Union is best for community members and small business owners seeking member-owned financial institution benefits, competitive rates, and personalized local service. The main consideration is that credit union membership may have eligibility requirements, and detailed loan terms/rates should be confirmed directly before applying, as the website provides limited product-specific information.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
